_note: Single source of truth for which Champions regulation ABRA is tracking. When a new regulation goes live: (1) run build/archive-regulation.js to snapshot the current store + models into data/archive/<id>/, (2) add the new regulation here and set 'active', (3) the ingest/analysis pick it up automatically. Every game is also tagged with its format, so old-reg data is never mixed in even before archiving.
